sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52321" key="kakore/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκορέκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ο</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὀρέγω</etym>) <sense id="n52321.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with evil yearnings</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀνήρ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.39</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
